notes: This inventory describes every tracked non-pyc file under */scripts/*.
It is not command authority. Blocking lane command storage remains in config/validation_lanes.json.
Route cards under script directories are included because they own local script boundaries.

reads: repo-local route guidance
script_surfaces.side_effects: route guidance only
script_surfaces.ci_inclusion: semantic AGENTS validation and script topology inventory

reads: stdin or caller-provided JSON payload
script_surfaces.side_effects: prints deterministic JSON; no repo writes
script_surfaces.ci_inclusion: local-only helper; import smoke covered by tests/test_script_topology.py
